metadata.description: Copilot CLI plugins for worktree isolation, service lifecycle, inter-agent communication, and GitHub Codespaces management

plugins.name: agent-worktrees
plugins.description: Worktree isolation system for concurrent Copilot CLI sessions - lifecycle management, finalization, cleanup, service discovery, and deployment patterns for monorepos

plugins.name: agent-bridge
plugins.description: Persistent inter-agent communication service - session management, SSE event streaming, and agent subprocess spawning

plugins.name: agent-codespaces
plugins.description: GitHub Codespaces lifecycle management, SSH transport, credential relay, and agent-bridge provider integration
